    • getModuleDesc

      public ModuleDesc<? extends IModule> getModuleDesc(String id)
      Returns the module desc with the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the module desc to retrieve
      Returns:
      the module desc or null if this module desc id is unknown.
